overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing an FBI agent exploring the dimly lit interior of a rustic wooden lodge. The character moves from the reception area through a dark hallway into guest rooms, using a flashlight to investigate the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: lodge reception and common area with stone fireplace

events.description: moving from bright reception area into dimmer common room with fireplace
approaching and entering the dark hallway

agents.ego_description: walking through the lodge reception and common area, passing wooden furniture and a large stone fireplace

notable_agents.action: woman standing behind the reception desk

entered.detail: wooden counter with papers and office supplies
large rustic stone fireplace with wooden mantel
tall wooden display cabinet with glass doors
brown leather couch in the common seating area
metal filing cabinets behind the reception desk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in the lodge reception area where an FBI agent walks past a reception desk staffed by a woman. The character proceeds through a warm, wood-paneled common area featuring a prominent stone fireplace, leather seating, and rustic decor. Natural light streams through windows, creating a mixed lighting environment as the character approaches a dark hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit hotel corridor with wooden paneling

events.description: flashlight activates as character enters the dark hallway
reaching and opening the door to a guest room

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow dark hallway using a flashlight to illuminate the wooden walls and doors

entered.detail: doorway leading from common area to hallway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dimly lit hallway with green carpet and wood-paneled walls. Using a flashlight to navigate the low-light environment, the agent walks past closed wooden doors and wall sconces toward a guest room at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic hotel room with wooden walls and vintage furniture

events.description: entering the hotel room from the hallway
character approaches the window to look outside
character turns to examine the desk and television area

agents.ego_description: investigating the hotel room by examining the bed, looking out the window, and checking the desk area with flashlight

entered.detail: rustic wooden bed with white linens and log-style frame
large window with sheer curtains allowing natural light
wooden standing coat rack with antler design
wooden writing desk with papers and lamp
vintage CRT television on wooden dresser
red upholstered armchair with wooden frame
white metal radiator beneath the window

segments.scene_description: The agent enters a vacant hotel room with wood-paneled walls and natural light filtering through the window. The character explores the space methodically, examining the rustic bed frame, approaching the window to look outside, then turning to inspect the desk area with an old television and red armchair. The room contains scattered boxes and vintage furniture creating a lived-in atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: small bathroom with green shower curtain and checkered floor

events.description: entering the bathroom from the bedroom

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and approaching the sink to investigate

entered.detail: white porcelain sink with silver faucet
black and white checkered tile flooring

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small, enclosed bathroom with checkered tile flooring and a green shower curtain. The space is dimly lit with artificial light as the agent approaches the sink and mirror, continuing the investigation of the lodge room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, open common areas of a rustic lodge into the claustrophobic, dimly lit confines of a guest suite. It begins in the reception area, moving past a staffed desk and through a wood-paneled lounge featuring a stone fireplace and natural light before approaching a dark corridor. As the character enters the narrow hallway, the lighting shifts abruptly to a low-light environment where a flashlight illuminates green carpeting and closed wooden doors. The scene then opens into a vacant hotel room, where the camera methodically pans across a rustic bed, a window, and a vintage desk area with an old television. Finally, the movement leads into a small, enclosed bathroom, transitioning from the room's natural light to the artificial glow of a space with checkered tile flooring and a green shower curtain.
